ion-button-style md button button-round button-solid ion-activatable ion-focusable hydrated

reviewSummary.summary: The draft captures the core login form controls but contains duplicate password elements, weak semantic naming, decorative noise, and missing validation/navigation elements required for robust downstream automation.

issues.message: Two different elements represent the same Password control. One is the native input and the other is the wrapper ion-input component.
issues.suggested_fix: Keep only the native password input element with locator id=ion-input-1 because it is more stable and directly actionable for automation.

issues.message: The element name 'password' is too generic and does not clearly indicate the control type.
issues.suggested_fix: Rename the element to 'password_textbox' for semantic clarity and downstream keyword quality.

issues.message: The background content container is decorative layout-only content and does not support business workflow automation.
issues.suggested_fix: Remove the background_content element from the approved page model.

issues.message: The SIGN IN button locator relies on visible text and may be brittle if UI text changes or localization is introduced.
issues.suggested_fix: Prefer a stable id, data-testid, aria-label, or semantic attribute if available. Retain current xpath only as fallback.

issues.message: The Login page workflow explicitly requires Back button navigation behavior, but no Back button element is present in the page model.
issues.suggested_fix: Add a back_button element using the shared navigation locator already referenced in upstream resources.

issues.message: The Login page workflow explicitly requires Home button navigation behavior, but no Home button element is present in the page model.
issues.suggested_fix: Add a home_button element using the shared navigation locator already referenced in upstream resources.

issues.message: The workflow requires observable validation of the generic Failed authentication message for invalid and blank login scenarios, but no failure message element exists in the page model.
issues.suggested_fix: Add a generic_failed_message element with a stable locator for authentication failure validation.

issues.message: The wrapper ion-input element was classified as a textbox even though it is a container component rather than the directly actionable input.
issues.suggested_fix: Remove the wrapper element and retain only the native actionable input field.

approved_elements.name: user_name_textbox
approved_elements.description: Username input field used for login authentication.

approved_elements.name: password_textbox
approved_elements.description: Password input field with masked character behavior.

approved_elements.name: back_button
approved_elements.description: Navigation control used to return to the Home page without authentication.

approved_elements.name: home_button
approved_elements.description: Navigation control used to return to the Home page from the Login page.

approved_elements.name: generic_failed_message
approved_elements.description: Generic authentication failure message displayed for invalid or incomplete login attempts.
